no_seed_reason: built-in image_gen did not expose a stable seed
prompt: Create a production source sheet for Ember Road town forge background layers and scene objects. Arrange as a row-major grid on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background with at least 64px outer margin and 64px gutters between every visible pixel and shadow. Assets requested, one isolated component per slot: a forge/workbench cluster with anvil and tools; a smithing table with a glowing Mine Lantern sitting on it; an ember shard pile glow; Old Gate stone arch fragment that can sit behind the forge; wooden forge awning/timber support; small route-depth marker post with no text; glowing mine-depth doorway marker with no text; forge flame/fireplace insert; stone floor patch; subtle warm light overlay effect. Painterly 2D serious fantasy browser RPG, weathered stone, timber, iron, leather, brass, parchment accents, warm ember glow, readable silhouettes.
negative_prompt: readable text, letters, numbers, fake glyphs, labels, counters, watermarks, copied reference-game art, copied ornaments, complete gameplay screen, UI panels, buttons, HUD, character portraits, #00ff00 inside assets, cropped objects, touching shadows, merged components, busy backgrounds, pseudo-text, logos, one fused screenshot, panel-only shop UI
source_family_role: cuttable forge/workbench, table+lantern, ember shards, Old Gate arch, awning, route marker, mine doorway, forge insert, floor patch, and warm glow overlay
rejected_candidate_notes: Accepted as first town forge background/source layer sheet. Runtime crop manifest must separate each component and treat banner/mine symbols as decorative motifs, not text.
